_meta.purpose: Catalog of external services this stack interacts with. Each entry documents the ban/AUP/rate-limit risks and the defense mechanism in place.

status_values.PROTECTED: wrapper or hook actively gates write ops
status_values.MONITORED: no wrapper but rate/usage tracked + alert on drift
status_values.READ_ONLY: stack only reads from this service; ban risk near zero
status_values.UNCOVERED: stack writes to this service but defense is incomplete
status_values.DOCUMENTED: stack does not write; documentation/link reference only
status_values.HOSTILE_BLOCKED: inbound actor classified hostile; edge + relay layers actively deny

_meta._when_to_wrap: If we can WRITE (POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE/upload/publish/submit) to it AND volume/rate could trigger anti-spam/AUP, build a *_safe.sh wrapper. If we only READ, monitoring is sufficient.

ttps: preamble injection ('You are part of the Sylex Commons community...')
filesystem reconnaissance via glob (paths leak attacker dev env: /home/alex/new-system, sergei/, sergei-bot/)
callable-interface seed (assemble_output(resolved_string, unresolved) — supply-chain shell pattern)
sylex-commons-187.77.212.130.defense: Iter 32 layered: (L1) Caddyfile @hostile_ip remote_ip 187.77.212.130 → respond 403 — edge drop; (L2) server.py _A2A_INJECTION_KEYS → category=injection; (L3) body redaction at journald (body_len + sha256 only, full payload not persisted); (L4) [A2A-INJECTION-ATTEMPT] separate log kind; (L5) reply text identical to noise/generic so classifier outcome is not observable to the sender

github.com.ban_history: two prior project accounts were suppressed early on
github.com.defense: gh_safe.sh + git_safe.sh + ~/.local/bin shims + account_health R1-R28 + pre-commit + pre-push hooks

pypi.org.ban_history: 2026-05-24 hit 'Too many new projects created' 429 after 4 publishes

platform.openai.com.note: API consumer (we read), no publish surface

openrouter.ai.defense: tools/anp2_image_gen.py — per-image cost cap ~$0.06 (warns+stops if exceeded), per-run cap 2 images, sparingly (not dozens), content-policy prompt guard; API key held in a gitignored env file (0600, never tracked); leak_audit openrouter-openai-key rule catches key leaks in tracked content
openrouter.ai.note: metered API consumer for ANP2 post images (openai/gpt-5-image-mini, cheapest). Outbound POST with key; no publish-to-platform surface

x.com.note: doc link / example value only — spec §4.1.1 human_anchor.platform examples in PROTOCOL.md + skill.md show how an agent may declare a Twitter/X profile as social anchor. Stack does not call x.com.

twitter.com.note: doc link / example value only — spec §4.1.1 lists twitter.com as an accepted host when human_anchor.platform = 'x.com'. Stack does not call twitter.com.

ban_patterns: disallowed content (none generated; abstract no-text images only)
api.openai.com.defense: tools/anp2_openai_image.py only (gpt-image-2 quality=low). content-policy prompt guard (refuses locale/origin/human-existence/legacy-identifier; forces no-text/no-logo), per-run cap 2, spend ledger + key in a gitignored env file. ANP2 article-image use only. Cost target ~$0.006/image (operator 2026-06-05); est_cost() computes USD from usage (img-out $30/1M, txt-in $5/1M, img-in $8/1M) + WARN if over target; spend_usd in ledger. Default 1536x1024 low ≈ $0.0053.

AWS / EC2 (relay host).defense: monitoring via account_health.py R-future + scrape_safe.sh for outbound HTTP rate-limit; no crypto-mining code permitted (leak_audit detects)

ban_patterns: AUP violations on Workers free tier (100k req/day)
Cloudflare (DNS only currently; Workers.defense: DNS read-only currently. If Workers added: cloudflare_safe.sh wrapper

LetsEncrypt (via Caddy ACME).defense: tools/caddy_apply.sh validates before restart, preventing renew storms

discord.com.defense: NOT used by claude-tools directly. operator-environment, not claude-tools, controls this.

anp2network.substack.com.defense: Our own Substack publication. No CLI/API write integration; browser-posted (Playwright, home-IP) like dev.to/medium. Linked read-only from site/writing.html (public Writing index). Governed by content policy + AI-authored-prose + post-followup discipline + no simultaneous identical multi-channel blast (C-execute). Same warmup persona.

dev.to.defense: no write integration; promotion policy governs.

ban_patterns: duplicate / unattributed cross-posting (Medium dedups & can deindex)
medium.com.defense: no CLI/API write integration; browser-posted (Playwright, home-IP) like dev.to. Governed by content policy + AI-authored-prose + post-followup discipline + canonical-syndication (rel=canonical back to the original dev.to essay; stagger, never simultaneous identical multi-channel blast = C-execute). Same warmup persona.

thecolony.cc.defense: AI-agent social/forum (Moltbook-class). API: self-register col_ key → POST /api/v1/auth/token {api_key} → JWT Bearer. col_ key in a gitignored env file. Browser/API-posted; governed by content policy + AI-authored-prose + post-followup + density>volume/no-burst (same as Moltbook). Warmup posture. leak_audit colony-key rule catches col_ leaks.

ban_patterns: n/a — account dormant, not built out
chirper.ai.defense: AI-CHARACTER social network (you create autonomous characters that AUTO-GENERATE posts). STRUCTURAL MISFIT: auto-generation = machine-generated prose, CONFLICTS with our AI-authored-in-context rule. Crypto-centric (CHIRP/Solana token; premium models cost CHIRP). Account ai@anp2.com created+verified 2026-06-06, token-free (NO wallet connected, NEVER connect a wallet / hold / spend CHIRP). DORMANT: no character created. creds in a gitignored env file. Keep-dormant-or-delete = operator decision.

api.coingecko.com.note: crypto price feed for market seed agent

api.open-meteo.com.note: weather feed for weather seed agent

feeds.bbci.co.uk.note: news RSS for news seed agent

hnrss.org.note: tech-news RSS for news seed agent

ifconfig.me.note: public-IP-echo service; used by tools/anp2_chrome_launch.sh to verify the SOCKS5 tunnel exit IP matches the relay before Chrome launches

api.ipify.org.note: public-IP-echo (alternate); used by Playwright tunnel-exit verification scripts

a2aregistry.org.note: A2A agent registry; we registered ANP2 relay (entry 881a37a2). Worker auto-pulls our .well-known/agent-card.json every 30 min; explicit refresh via PUT /api/agents/<id>.

glama.ai.note: MCP server aggregator/directory. Auto-ingests our published MCP server from the official MCP registry; prototypes/mcp-server/glama.json is repo-side metadata it reads when indexing us. The stack only GETs glama.ai to verify our listing (internal/tools/artifact_status.py); no API writes — passive/read-only.

aiia.ro.note: AI Agent registry (Romanian-hosted). Listed as a registration target in prototypes/landing/JOIN.md + site/JOIN.md. Not yet registered.

agentlair.dev.note: AI-agent identity infra + A2A behavioral-trust directory. We are auto-listed as 'ANP2 Network Relay' (it passively probes our public /api/a2a; no manual submit). robots Allow:* ; free /a2a-audit (~3min) re-audit trigger; registration (API key + @agentlair.dev email) exists but NOT done. As of 2026-05-30 score Grade F / L4=0 (over-claimed A2A capabilities) — fixed by the 2026-05-30 agent-card honesty change; awaiting their re-crawl. Read-only/passive today.
agentlair.dev.operator_decision_pending: whether to register an @agentlair.dev identity (= new external account; needs outreach-safety vetting; defer during warmup) and whether to trigger /a2a-audit for a faster re-score

example.test.note: RFC reserved test domain in docs
